basics.name: Ehasan Ahmed
basics.title: Junior Software Engineer
basics.summary: Versatile Fullstack Developer with a strong foundation in Python, Django, and JavaScript technologies, including React, Node.js, and Express. Experienced in integrating MQTT and WebSocket for real-time communication, with expertise in database management and UI design.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science & Engineering
education.description: Focused on software engineering, algorithms, and data structures. Active in IEEE ULAB Student Branch as General Secretary and Vice Chairperson.
Studied advanced mathematics, physics, chemistry, and programming. Participated in competitive programming contests.

experience.description: Developed responsive UI components and optimized Tailwind CSS usage. Integrated API calls and state management within Next.js.
Developed an Android app for logistics operations, implemented backend APIs, and designed database management for optimized performance.
Created complex data pipelines for IoT devices, optimized databases, and developed RESTful APIs for IoT and financial applications.

projects.name: Distributed Ledger System
projects.description: A multichain-based supply chain management system integrating separate sidechains with a mainchain for secure and transparent transactions.

projects.name: IoT Greenhouse Management System
projects.description: A real-time IoT-based greenhouse monitoring system with WebSockets, Django REST, and ESP32 for automation and data visualization.

projects.name: NoteForge
projects.description: A markdown-based note-taking web application with seamless editing and saving capabilities.

projects.name: Event Ticketing System with Smart Contracts
projects.description: A blockchain-based event ticketing system with secure transaction verification using Ethereum smart contracts.

projects.name: NS2 Trace File Interpreter
projects.description: A parser for analyzing and visualizing trace files generated by NS2 (Network Simulator 2).

projects.name: Radio Frequency Map Designer
projects.description: A tool for visualizing and designing radio frequency coverage maps based on signal strength data.

accomplishments: 1st Runner-Up in ULAB Takeoff Programming Contest 2021
1st Runner-Up in GP Academy - Cisco Quiz Competition

extracurricular.description: Organized technical workshops and seminars, Instructed python development workshops, increased branch membership, and fostered a collaborative environment.
Organized Apreture F/1 & F/2 photography exhibitions, organized workshops, and managed club activities and membership development strategies.
